decline_probing: Multiple declined transactions followed by an approval.
new_p2p_transfer: Large transfer to a previously unseen beneficiary.
dormant_reactivation: Large debit after a long period of inactivity.
country_mismatch_solid: First transaction from a new country through a high-confidence channel.
new_account_large_amount: Large transaction from a newly opened account.
device_added_same_day: Device was added shortly before it was used.
structuring: Multiple transactions collectively exceed the structuring threshold.
velocity_burst: High number of transactions within 24 hours.
currency_threshold_missing: No thresholds are configured for this currency. Threshold-based rules were skipped, but statistical anomaly detection was still performed.
